commands.review_summary:
This PR injects documented `OPENCLAW_AGENT_ID` and `OPENCLAW_SESSION_KEY` values into exec child-process environments across gateway, node-host, and macOS execution paths, with tests and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. for the current capability gap: source inspection of current main shows exec child env only gets `OPENCLAW_SHELL=exec`, so a child process printing the requested vars would not see them. The PR body also supplies after-fix terminal output for the gateway path.
commands.review_followup: The PR is a coherent external feature patch with sufficient gateway proof, but it is unmergeable in GitHub and adds a public env contract that needs maintainer/contributor handling rather than a ClawSweeper repair job.

target.title: feat(exec): inject OPENCLAW_SESSION_KEY and OPENCLAW_AGENT_ID env vars for child processes
target.author: name5566
